title: sitanion hystrix
intro: Sitanion hystrix, also known as sticky gilia or sticky gilgia, is a perennial herb in the borage family native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sitanion hystrix include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Sitanion hystrix can be found in tinctures, salves, and teas, often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and viral infections.
